description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the gcc Docker image with no additional services. Define two stages: build and test. In the build stage add a build job that runs before_script "apt update && apt -y install make cmake", then script "mkdir build && cd build && cmake .. && make all", and publishes the paths build/snigl, build/libsnigl.a, and build/libsnigl.so as artifacts. In the test stage add a test job that runs the built binary with script "build/snigl test/all.sl".
